mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( no, role, id, pw, email, provider, provider_id, phone, name, nickname, birth, gender, money, zip_code, addr1, addr2, star_sum, black, reg_date, img_url, self_pr ) VALUES ( MEMBER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 0, 1, NULL, #{email}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, NULL )

update member set pw = #{pw}, email = #{email}, phone= #{phone}, name=#{name}, nickname=#{nickname}, birth =TO_DATE(#{birth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), gender= #{gender}, zip_code=#{zipCode}, addr1=#{addr1}, addr2=#{addr2} where no = #{no}
update member set name=#{name}, nickname=#{nickname}, birth =TO_DATE(#{birth}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), gender= #{gender}, zip_code=#{zipCode}, addr1=#{addr1}, addr2=#{addr2} where no = #{no}
